formulas.plain-language_definition: Observed aggregate mean for an approved AI Fluency dimension, cohort, and wave.
formulas.expected_direction: higher values indicate stronger aggregate dimension posture
assumptions: inputs are approved aggregate statistics

formulas.plain-language_definition: Aggregate standard error when approved aggregate standard deviation and response count are available.
formulas.expected_direction: smaller values indicate less aggregate measurement uncertainty
assumptions: sufficient aggregate uncertainty statistics are present
limitations: must remain missing when sufficient statistics are absent

formulas.plain-language_definition: Validates aggregate AI Fluency snapshots and blocks raw respondent, HR, confidence, probability, ROI, and customer-output side doors.
formulas.expected_direction: valid snapshots may feed internal model context only when uncertainty and review gates pass
assumptions: source adapter already produced aggregate-only fields
limitations: does not fit a Fluency measurement model

formulas.plain-language_definition: Imports source-provided aggregate AI Fluency summaries using version-bound adapter logic.
formulas.expected_direction: higher values follow the approved source instrument direction
assumptions: weights are bound to source/instrument version rather than runtime input
limitations: adapter math is not respondent scoring authority

formulas.plain-language_definition: Normalizes approved dashboard aggregate scores between dashboard scale conventions.
formulas.expected_direction: higher values retain source-positive direction
assumptions: scale declaration is source-bound

formulas.plain-language_definition: Future Bayesian model for latent aggregate AI Fluency capability with measurement error.
formulas.expected_direction: higher latent values indicate stronger aggregate capability posture
assumptions: future validation exists
aggregate uncertainty is available

formulas.plain-language_definition: Any unversioned, runtime-tuned, or ad hoc overall AI Fluency score.
formulas.expected_direction: not_authorized
assumptions: not_applicable
limitations: prohibited because weighting must be instrument-version governed

formulas.plain-language_definition: V2 aggregate-distribution index for adoption energy across frequency, engagement, and breadth.
formulas.expected_direction: higher values indicate stronger aggregate adoption energy
assumptions: V2 canonical event distributions are aggregate and independently suppressed

formulas.plain-language_definition: Existing opt-in adjustment factor derived from Velocity Index under the Quality Multiplier contract.
formulas.expected_direction: higher values may increase the existing governed adjustment factor
assumptions: compiled constants remain in code
validation_tests: backend tests for quality multiplier and velocity index

formulas.plain-language_definition: Depth Repertoire may appear only as aggregate caveat/context and must not change eligibility, confidence bands, or economic numbers.
formulas.expected_direction: not used as a numeric driver
assumptions: Depth Repertoire is interpretable and independently surfaced
limitations: must not adjust confidence, eligibility, ranges, ROI, or model coefficients

formulas.plain-language_definition: An arbitrary total score blending Velocity, Breadth, and Depth.
formulas.expected_direction: not_authorized
assumptions: not_applicable
limitations: prohibited because VBD dimensions must remain distinct unless separately governed

formulas.plain-language_definition: Internal movement convention where favorable outcome movement is positive.
formulas.output_unit: metric native unit after direction adjustment
formulas.expected_direction: positive values are favorable only when direction was predeclared
assumptions: expected direction was declared before outcome review
limitations: must not be flipped after observation to rescue a claim

formulas.mathematical_expression: indicator = movement exceeds predeclared minimum worthwhile change
formulas.plain-language_definition: Internal decision-context indicator for whether movement is practically meaningful.
formulas.expected_direction: true means movement exceeds the predeclared practical context
assumptions: minimum worthwhile change is declared before fitting
limitations: not a prior or likelihood anchor

formulas.mathematical_expression: g(mu_i) = alpha + beta_post*post_i + beta_treated*treated_i + delta*post_i*treated_i + partial_pooling_terms
formulas.plain-language_definition: Current synthetic-only Bayesian DiD proof estimand for valid two-group pre/post comparison-supported designs.
formulas.expected_direction: predeclared per hypothesis
assumptions: synthetic-only proof data
all DiD diagnostics and gates pass
limitations: does not authorize customer-facing confidence or probability

formulas.mathematical_expression: Y[h,c,t] ~ Normal(mu[h,c,t], se[h,c,t]); mu includes baseline trend plus lagged Velocity and Breadth exposures
formulas.plain-language_definition: Synthetic smoke model for internal in-sample VBD contrast using ordered aggregate windows.
formulas.expected_direction: predeclared per hypothesis
assumptions: synthetic-only inputs
lagged exposure uses prior windows only

formulas.mathematical_expression: future route pending state-space model, calibration, diagnostics, and approval
formulas.plain-language_definition: Future historical counterfactual route for repeated aggregate windows.
formulas.expected_direction: predeclared per future proposal
assumptions: future proposal implements and validates exact route

formulas.mathematical_expression: coherence_review = internal directional review across Fluency context, VBD movement, and primary outcome movement
formulas.plain-language_definition: Future internal review of whether the predeclared theory of change is directionally coherent.
formulas.expected_direction: directional coherence only
assumptions: future proposal defines review rubric
limitations: cannot rescue a failed primary outcome

formulas.plain-language_definition: Internal cap so narrow estimates under weak or unsupported designs cannot create stronger claims.
formulas.expected_direction: lower cap is more restrictive
assumptions: applied after estimation and before interpretation
limitations: favorable Fluency or VBD cannot rescue failed primary outcome

formulas.plain-language_definition: Any finance assumption, ROI Bot context, or business target that upgrades evidence design strength or claim level.
formulas.expected_direction: not_authorized
assumptions: not_applicable

formulas.plain-language_definition: Customer-owned aggregate testing template for cycle-time movement.
formulas.expected_direction: lower may be favorable only when predeclared
assumptions: customer owns source metric and interpretation
limitations: must not emit dollars or hours saved

formulas.plain-language_definition: Customer-owned aggregate testing template for friction-rate movement.
formulas.expected_direction: lower may be favorable only when predeclared
assumptions: customer owns source metric and interpretation

formulas.plain-language_definition: Customer-owned aggregate testing template for sales-cycle movement.
formulas.expected_direction: lower may be favorable only when predeclared
assumptions: customer owns source metric and interpretation

formulas.plain-language_definition: Customer-owned aggregate testing template for conversion-rate movement.
formulas.expected_direction: higher may be favorable only when predeclared
assumptions: customer owns source metric and interpretation

formulas.plain-language_definition: Customer-owned aggregate testing template for quality-rate movement.
formulas.expected_direction: higher may be favorable only when predeclared
assumptions: customer owns source metric and interpretation

formulas.plain-language_definition: Customer-owned aggregate testing template for throughput movement.
formulas.expected_direction: higher may be favorable only when predeclared
assumptions: customer owns source metric and interpretation

formulas.plain-language_definition: Customer-owned aggregate testing template for trust-coverage share.
formulas.expected_direction: higher may be favorable only when predeclared
assumptions: customer owns source metric and interpretation

formulas.plain-language_definition: Customer-owned aggregate testing template for exception-rate movement.
formulas.expected_direction: lower may be favorable only when predeclared
assumptions: customer owns source metric and interpretation

formulas.plain-language_definition: Customer-owned aggregate testing template for experience-metric movement.
formulas.expected_direction: predeclared by customer metric owner
assumptions: customer owns source metric and interpretation

formulas.plain-language_definition: Dollarized modeled value calculation from movement and financial assumptions.
formulas.expected_direction: not_authorized
assumptions: not_applicable

formulas.plain-language_definition: Portfolio-level economic value total or value-at-risk calculation.
formulas.expected_direction: not_authorized
assumptions: not_applicable
limitations: prohibited because portfolio economic output is not authorized

formulas.plain-language_definition: Existing compiled behavioral discount/amplifier on source time-saved estimates from canonical event evidence.
formulas.expected_direction: higher means stronger quality evidence under existing contract
assumptions: compiled constants remain in code

formulas.plain-language_definition: Existing compiled Quality Multiplier path for forwarded aggregate distributions.
formulas.expected_direction: higher means stronger quality evidence under existing contract
assumptions: forwarded distribution is aggregate and approved

formulas.plain-language_definition: Existing compiled aggregate reliability composite for operational dependability.
formulas.expected_direction: higher means more operationally dependable evidence
assumptions: compiled constants remain in code

formulas.plain-language_definition: Existing deterministic pre/post aggregate pattern movement, despite the historical feature name.
formulas.expected_direction: contract-specific pattern improvement direction
assumptions: windows are approved and non-overlapping

formulas.plain-language_definition: Existing V3 aggregate verdict and forwarded distribution derivations.
formulas.output_unit: V3 aggregate verdict and derived distributions
formulas.expected_direction: SURFACE only when existing gates clear
assumptions: V3 aggregate payload respects customer-side transformer boundary
limitations: does not add events or suppression reasons
validation_tests: backend tests for V3 aggregate ingest

formulas.mathematical_expression: decision = SUPPRESS if ambiguity_flag || window_length_days < 60 || behavioral_classes_present < 2; otherwise candidate_decision ?? SUPPRESS
formulas.plain-language_definition: Existing fail-closed evaluation decision forces SUPPRESS for ambiguity, windows shorter than 60 days, or fewer than two behavior classes, and otherwise defaults a missing candidate decision to SUPPRESS.
formulas.expected_direction: SUPPRESS unless the existing surfacing gates clear
assumptions: default verdict remains fail-closed
limitations: does not add or override suppression reasons
does not make the registry executable

formulas.plain-language_definition: Legacy seeded or illustrative HTML scoring that is not canonical formula authority.
formulas.expected_direction: not_canonical
assumptions: legacy demo context only
limitations: must not be treated as canonical instrument scoring
